description: A plain candid operational/arrest photograph with no on-image text or graphic design. In an outdoor setting in front of a large multi-story tan apartment building (with a dumpster, parked vehicles, and a grassy/dirt lot), four men are gathered. Three wear dark tactical law-enforcement gear; one in the center-right wears a tan plate carrier vest with 'POLICE' printed across the back and gray tactical pants, and another at left wears a face covering/balaclava and a holstered sidearm. They appear to be detaining or handcuffing a man in the center who is wearing a dark t-shirt, shorts, a light cap, and sandals, facing away. The scene depicts an apparent ICE/partner field arrest (Operation Tidal Wave, per the tweet). No slogans, seals, or meme styling are present, so it is documentary rather than designed.
